item.text: {"case_id":"mtj-031","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":false,"first_sentence_lock":null,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":null,"over_forced_verdict":null,"rationale":"The assistant routed the request as a release/code review audit, asking for PRs, commit range, release notes, changelog, or diff, and framed the review around bugs, compatibility, migration, security, rollback, and testing evidence. It did not trigger a generic artifact-improvement/TVG loop from the word “audit,” so this negative-control stay-asleep behavior earns full credit."}
